name: trainingCapture.ts service layer
description: Centralized real-time training capture: Created TypeScript service (src/services/llm/trainingCapture.ts) that automatically captures v7 training examples on each model interaction. Exports functions: captureMultiTurn, captureDPO, captureToolLoopRecovery, captureSuccessfulToolUse. Hooked into queryModelRouter.ts to capture automatically after model responses. Stores to LanceDB with v7 format (multi-turn, DPO pairs, tags, quality scores, embeddings). Removed shell script capture logic (capture_multi_turn_example, capture_dpo_pair stubs). Enable via TRAINING_CAPTURE=true env var (configured in .env and docker-compose.yml).
